data.description_suggestion: Generates a chat completion response based on the provided messages and model. Accepts a ChatCompletionRequest containing the model identifier, message history, and optional parameters (temperature, max_tokens, etc.). Returns a ChatCompletionResponse with the generated message, token usage, and completion metadata. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, inputs, or outputs. Added clarity about the request/response schemas, parameter types, authentication requirement, and what the operation produces.

data.description_suggestion: Generates a text completion based on the provided prompt and model. Accepts a CompletionRequest containing the model identifier, prompt text, and optional parameters (temperature, max_tokens, top_p, etc.). Returns a CompletionResponse with generated text choices, token usage, and completion metadata. Requires Bearer authentication.

Summary is adequate, but description lacks details about request/response structure, multiple input support, use cases, and authentication. data.current_description: Creates an embedding vector representing the input text
data.description_suggestion: Generates embedding vectors representing the input text(s). Accepts an EmbeddingRequest containing the model identifier and one or more text inputs. Returns an EmbeddingResponse with embedding vectors for each input, model information, and token usage. Embeddings are numerical representations suitable for semantic search, clustering, and similarity comparisons. Requires Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks details about request/response structure, multiple input support, use cases, and authentication. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand when embeddings are needed and what to expect.

data.current_description: Transcribes audio into the input language
data.description_suggestion: Transcribes audio content into text in the audio's original language. Accepts audio file input and optional parameters (language, model). Returns transcribed text and metadata. Supports common audio formats (MP3, WAV, M4A, etc.). Requires Bearer authentication.

data.description_suggestion: Transcribes and translates audio content into English text. Accepts audio file input and optional parameters (model). Returns translated text and metadata.
